raw_title: Connecting to Local Publics Through Media: An in-Depth Study of Local Media Use and Public Connection
title_en: Connecting to Local Publics Through Media: An in-Depth Study of Local Media Use and Public Connection
title_zh: 通过媒体连接本地公众：本地媒体使用与公共连接的深入研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何使用本地媒体来与社区建立联系。它深入调查了本地媒体的使用习惯，以及这些习惯如何帮助人们感觉自己是社区的一部分。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how people use local media to connect with their communities. It investigates local media usage habits and how these habits help people feel part of their community.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于数字新闻学和媒体研究领域，关注本地媒体在促进社区参与和公共连接中的作用。
research_direction_en: This research falls within digital journalism and media studies, focusing on the role of local media in fostering community engagement and public connection.
